label: expectedAssets is parsed but dropped from scorer gold, so assets are invisible to expected-resource recall
current router filters all assets before first-slice scoring, so folding expectedAssets changes current D2 but not current D3
asset-bearing gold is behavior-relevant for D4, especially SD-001 interaction gates and CS-001 Motion snippets
live scoring can count stated assets as actual resources while expected assets are omitted, creating D3 waste artifacts
D4 remains n=2 approximate and cannot prove whether asset deferral improves routine-task usefulness
